snippets.description: A2 diff — new user.created/updated/deleted branch. Import added: `import { prisma } from "@repo/db/prisma"`. The user.* block is placed BEFORE the organizationMembership Stripe-sync block and returns early on every user.* event, so the existing seat-sync path (commit 9a3593d) is never entered by a user.* event. No Stripe SDK / no 21st-dev Supabase/billing code imported (E4). user.deleted uses prisma.local_users.deleteMany (idempotent); user.created/updated use prisma.local_users.upsert. All Prisma errors caught and returned as a generic 'User sync failed' 500 (no schema/DB detail leaked).
snippets.content: import { prisma } from "@repo/db/prisma"; ... if (eventType==="user.created"||"user.updated"||"user.deleted") { if(!clerkUserId) return 400; try { if deleted -> deleteMany({where:{id}}) else upsert({where:{id},create,update}); } catch { console.error(...); return 'User sync failed' 500 } return 'OK' 200 }

snippets.description: local_users model post-rename (was `model users`). 20 back-relation fields, unchanged. Referenced by 21 forward FK sites across 20 models (components holds 2 named relations: components_hunter_usernameTousers + components_user_idTousers). onDelete is a MIX — NOT changed by this phase: 11 Cascade (api_keys L28, author_payouts L47, bundles L129, component_analytics L170, component_likes L208, demo_hunt_votes L340, mcp_component_usage L435, mcp_generation_requests L454, payout_rates L469, templates L572, usages L612) and 10 NoAction (bundle_purchases L116, collections L154, components hunter L264, components user_id L266, components_purchases L286, demos L402, feedback L422, referral_payments L512, sandboxes L530, users_to_plans L679).
snippets.content: model local_users { id String @id ... api_keys api_keys[] author_payouts author_payouts[] ... }

snippets.description: Zero-live-wiring grep. Exact command run and output.
snippets.content: $ grep -rE "from ['\"].*21st-dev/apps/web/app/api/(search|webhooks/clerk|stripe)" apps/web/ | wc -l  =>  0.  Broader any-reference grep (catches re-export/require/dynamic-import barrel bypass, adversarial scenario c): grep -rE "21st-dev/apps/web/app/api/(search|webhooks/clerk|stripe)" apps/web/ | wc -l  =>  0.

snippets.description: Prisma generator block (E1 confirmation). output = ./client resolves to packages/db/prisma/client/ — OUTSIDE packages/db/dist/, so tsup --clean (which wipes dist/) does NOT delete the generated client. The barrel (src/index.ts) intentionally does NOT re-export the Prisma type through tsup --dts (Prisma's 3.1MB index.d.ts uses TS `import =` syntax that rollup-dts cannot parse); the client is exposed via a dedicated subpath export `@repo/db/prisma` built by a second tsup entry without --dts.
snippets.content: generator client { provider = "prisma-client-js" previewFeatures = ["postgresqlExtensions","relationJoins"] output = "./client" binaryTargets = ["native","rhel-openssl-3.0.x"] }
